top_signals.title: Stardust Power joins Department of Energy-backed lithium extraction program
top_signals.summary: The project:  “Coal- and Waste Coal-based Electrodes for Direct Lithium Extraction from Domestic Waste Streams,” was selected for award negotiations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NMFTA launches anonymous threat reporting portal for freight fraud and cybercrime
top_signals.summary:
As freight fraud, cargo theft and cyber-enabled crime continue to evolve, the National Motor Freight Traffic Association has launched a new Threat Report Portal designed to help transportation companies anonymously share incidents and identify emerging risks. NMFTA says the platform will provide a centralized location for reporting fraud, cyber threats and suspicious activity while helping the industry build a clearer picture of evolving criminal tactics.

The post NMFTA launches anonymous threat reporting portal for freight fraud and cybercrime appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Eli Manning weighs in on Giants QB Jaxson Dart's Trump rally fallout
top_signals.summary: Eli Manning spoke about political activities from athletes after Giants QB Jaxson Dart introduced President Donald Trump at a rally.

top_signals.title: Surge Battery raises $21M for Nevada lithium project
top_signals.summary: The financing is being led by Brian Paes-Braga, managing partner at SAF Group, and Michael Hess of Hess Capital.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals gets NOAA compliance
top_signals.summary: The company is one of several that aim to explore the sea, where polymetallic nodules found on the deep ocean floor contain critical minerals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: USA Rare Earth finalizes $1.6B funding with Commerce Department
top_signals.summary: The company now has $3.5 billion in capital to fund its growth plans, USAR said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
